summary: This document contains Spanish-language testing notes evaluating an AI companion agent's performance regarding latency, noise handling, and conversation flow. It also includes the system prompt instructions for a virtual psychological assistant designed to emulate specific public figures for elderly care in Chile. The instructions define persona traits and interaction rules for the AI.
